# Data Exchange Manuals

Use the links on this page to access resources on using Spectrum Data Exchange.

- [Authorization Setup](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/9bd043d0-8ea8-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..VJoh6-CDlO5bGAoycxYFD6Dz3llOzvpQ1OSAxxaD7n0&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22SDX-AUTHORIZATION-SETUP-2021R2.pdf%22)
